generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor providing real-time environmental data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSSensorDataRealTime : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model with geometric and semantic data for BCS components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool for transforming enriched BIM models into structured digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing real-time sensor data for monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for building infrastructure operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for infrastructure operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building conditions for operational decisions"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of building performance for proactive maintenance"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy and resource usage for sustainable operations"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building environment for digital twin operations"
    base:contains BIMModel, BCSSensor, MDEEnabler, RealTimeDataProcessingEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, RealTimeInsight, PredictiveInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environment (defining sensors, actuators, controllers), transformation via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) to extract structured representations and generate deployable artifacts, followed by runtime operations and evolution through custom service development by DT Engineers. Transition between phases is automated through MDE principles with minimal manual intervention, supported by role-based governance where Building Control Engineers handle modeling, Facility Managers monitor operations, and DT Engineers extend functionality."
]
